tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride and LDL cholesterol, low HDL cholesterol, and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Lipid profile indicates increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and glycemic control are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lipid management and further evaluation of acid-base status if clinically indicated.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
